name: 14oz Stoneware Love You More Hearts Stacking Mug White - Spritz™
description: Add a sweet charm to your drinkware with this Love You More Hearts Stacking Mug from Spritz™. Made of stoneware, this white mug features "love you more" text in red on the inside and a mini red hearts print on the bottom, making it perfect for serving and sharing your favorite drinks with loved ones. With a capacity of 14 fluid ounces, it's ideal for serving coffee, tea, hot chocolate and more. Plus, it's microwave and dishwasher safe for easy reheating and cleaning.
